info.title: Entity Framework Ruler
info.description:
-----------------------
Rule Generation Usage:
efruler -g <edmxfilepath> <efCoreProjectBasePath>
efruler -g <pathContainingEdmxAndCsProj>
efruler -g . (assuming current directory contains edmx and csproj)
Rule Applicator Usage:
efruler -a <pathContainingRulesAndCsProj>
efruler -a . (assuming current directory contains edmx and csproj)
